name: Ashley C.
text: Ordered the smoked salmon and it was moist and delicious.

name: Stevan S.
text: Matt puts his heart and soul into producing the most amazing smoked meats! My faves are the brisket, smoked pork butt, and the chicken legs! This is one small business that deserves ALL the accolades. Highly recommend!

name: Beau W.
text: Without a doubt, this is THE best barbecue you will ever have in DC. The quality and flavor of the brisket, ribs, and other smoked meats rival the best BBQ spots from Kansas City or Austin. The attention to detail, time, and care Matthew puts into his grilling comes through in everything he makes. He definitely knows his stuff and it shows through the product. Could not recommend 202 BBQ enough.

name: Sam F.
text: I ordered an entire 17lb brisket and it was literally the most juicy and tender brisket I have ever had in my life! Highly recommend!
